name: exploratory-testing
description: Athena CLI runs this authored exploratory workflow across sessions - gather evidence, frame risk hypotheses, capture exploration gaps, and recommend the appropriate execution workflow when runnable automation is requested
marketplaceDescription: Explore an app to surface risks and unknowns, then hand findings to a planning workflow
examplePrompts: Define an exploratory charter for the onboarding flow at https://myapp.com
What should we investigate first in this new admin dashboard?
Frame the key risk hypotheses for the checkout journey
